repos.description: Documentation sources rendered by this Vellum deployment.

nav.description: Site-level top navigation. Each repo can also declare its own nav (vellum.json `nav` or VitePress themeConfig.nav) which takes precedence inside that repo.

title.description: Brand name shown in the NavBar and as the SSR <title> suffix.

tagline.description: Short subtitle shown on the landing page hero.

logo.description: URL of the site logo (SVG recommended).

footer.description: Footer text rendered below every page.

homepageRepo.description: Slug of the repo whose root acts as the site's landing page. `/` redirects here, and the NavBar brand link points here with the current locale preserved.

defaultLocale.description: Locale code used when the URL has no locale prefix.

locales.description: All supported locales. Order is preserved in the language picker.

socialLinks.description: Icon-only links rendered in the NavBar between the locale picker and theme toggle. Built-in icons cover github / gitlab / x / discord / slack / mastodon / bluesky / youtube / linkedin / instagram / facebook / npm / rss / stackoverflow / reddit / twitch / telegram; custom glyphs go via `{ svg: "<svg ...>" }`.

aiSummary.description: Microsoft Learn-style "AI Summary" button rendered below the page title on doc pages. Omit the whole block to disable the feature. Credentials (API keys, Turnstile secret) live in worker env vars, not this file.

aiChat.description: "Ask AI" chat drawer. Floating button bottom-right opens a chat panel; the model can call docs tools (search_docs, fetch_page, list_repos, list_pages) to answer questions across the site. Omit the whole block to disable. Shares provider credentials with aiSummary.

code.description: Locale code (e.g. "en", "zh", "ja"). Used in cache keys and i18n lookup.

label.description: Human-readable name shown in the language picker.

prefix.description: URL segment for this locale (e.g. "zh" → /repo/zh/...). Empty string means the locale lives at the root of each repo.

provider.description: "workers-ai" uses the env.AI binding (Cloudflare Workers AI; no API key needed). "openai-compatible" calls any OpenAI-shaped Chat Completions endpoint (OpenAI itself, OpenRouter, Together, Groq, llama.cpp, …) using VELLUM_AI_API_KEY and VELLUM_AI_BASE_URL. "anthropic" calls the Anthropic Messages API with VELLUM_AI_API_KEY.

model.description: Model identifier passed verbatim to the provider. Defaults: "@cf/meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct-fp8-fast" (workers-ai), "openai/gpt-4o-mini" (openai-compatible), "claude-haiku-4-5" (anthropic).

baseUrl.description: Base URL override for openai-compatible providers, e.g. "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1". The VELLUM_AI_BASE_URL env var takes precedence when set.

turnstileSiteKey.description: Cloudflare Turnstile site key. When set, the AI Summary button mounts an invisible Turnstile widget and the worker verifies the token before calling the model. Pairs with the VELLUM_TURNSTILE_SECRET worker secret.

cacheTtlSeconds.description: How long to retain a generated summary in KV before regenerating it. Defaults to 604800 (7 days).

provider.description: Same matrix as AiSummaryConfig.provider. Note that tool calling (used by the chat agent to fetch docs) is most reliably supported by "openai-compatible" and "anthropic"; "workers-ai" works with a smaller model menu.

model.description: Model id. Defaults: "@cf/meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct-fp8-fast" (workers-ai), "openai/gpt-4o-mini" (openai-compatible), "claude-haiku-4-5" (anthropic). A stronger reasoning model is often worth the extra cost here.

baseUrl.description: Base URL override for openai-compatible providers.

turnstileSiteKey.description: Cloudflare Turnstile site key. When set, the visitor solves one invisible challenge per chat session and the worker issues a 60-minute signed session token that subsequent messages present. Pairs with VELLUM_TURNSTILE_SECRET.

maxIterations.description: Maximum agent loop iterations (model-call → tool-call rounds) per user message. Defaults to 6.

slug.description: URL segment for the repo (e.g. "prism" → /prism/...). Must be unique within `repos[]`.

source.description: Where the markdown lives. "github" (default) reads from raw.githubusercontent.com; "local" reads from local-docs/{slug}/ bundled into the worker's ASSETS at build time.

owner.description: GitHub owner. Required when source is "github".

repo.description: GitHub repo name. Required when source is "github".

branch.description: Default branch to fetch from. Used as the cache key suffix and as the fallback when no `versions[]` is declared.

docsRoot.description: Path inside the repo (or local source) to the docs tree, e.g. "docs". Empty string means the repo root is the docs root.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the NavBar brand crumb and 404 suggestions.

description.description: Short tagline shown on the repo's home page and as the SSR meta description fallback.

logo.description: URL of the per-repo logo (SVG recommended).

editLinkPattern.description: Template for the "Edit this page" link in the page footer. `:path` is substituted with the docs-root-relative path. Omit for local repos.

versions.description: Optional version selector. Default version is used when no version is encoded in the URL.

localPath.description: Override for where local-source files live. Defaults to `local-docs/{slug}`. Path is relative to the project root.

hideInBrand.description: When true, the NavBar omits this repo's displayName crumb after the site title. Useful for the homepageRepo so the brand doesn't read "Site | Site".

excludeFromSearch.description: When true, the repo is omitted from search results in both the per-repo dialog scope picker and the cross-repo full-page search. Use for landing-page repos and other "system" content the reader shouldn't be sent to by a query.

socialLinks.description: Per-repo override for site.socialLinks. Shown in the NavBar while the reader is inside this repo. The repo's own vellum.json#socialLinks or VitePress themeConfig.socialLinks take higher priority when present.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the version picker (e.g. "v2", "main", "next").

branch.description: Git branch / ref this version corresponds to.

default.description: True for the version selected when no explicit version is encoded in the URL.

link.description: Destination URL or site-relative path. Omit when this item is a dropdown trigger (use `items`).

items.description: Children — turns this nav entry into a dropdown menu.

activeMatch.description: Regex (against the current page's repo-relative path) that marks this entry as active. Lets a nav entry stay highlighted across a whole section.

title: Vellum site config
description: Top-level config consumed by the Vellum worker. Generated from src/shared/types.ts by scripts/gen-site-schema.ts — edit the types or that script's OVERRIDES table, not this file.
